TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-pear_Balenge

S.FORM: iakay kudra tutumu kudra matuase mu lregelrege si lrimalra ku navate.
S.TRANSL: 有個老爺爺離開去山上(他)將採番石榴。
There is an old man who leaves for mountain and (he) will take guavas.

S.FORM: la katuase mubelenge malra kudra navate.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)離開去上面拿番石榴。
Then (he) left to the top to take guavas.

S.FORM: la iluku ku tulru ku karadrare.
S.TRANSL: (他) 帶三個籃子。
(He) brings three baskets.

S.FORM: sa kay belenge malramalra kudra navate la ikay kudra vavalake kudra yacengecenge walribalribate si la iluku ku lribalribate kuini tamalramalrane ini kuini navate si katuase lribate iniane.
S.TRANSL: (那小孩)經過他摘番石榴的地方然後離開。
(The child) is passing his guava-taking place and walk away.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: sa maka lribate kuini yacengecenge yaie la ikay kudra vavalake kudra mua lrikilrikili katuase lribate kuini tamalramalrane ini kuini navate.
S.TRANSL: 經過之後，正好有一個小孩經過他摘番石榴的地方。
After passing, there is a child riding his bike passing by his guava-picking place just in time.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kuini vavalake sa lribate kuini ki e tamalramalrane kuini ki tutumu kuini navate yaie la isadra si dreeele la malra kudra e lanavate.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩，當經過那老人摘番石榴的地方，停了下來，看了看，然後拿走了番石榴。
This child, when (he) passes the guava-taking place of the old man; (he) stopped; (he) takes a look, and (he) takes the guavas.

S.FORM: iluku pua ki lrikili ini si la katuase iluku kudra e suaete kudra e navate kuini ki karadradre.
S.TRANSL: (他)把(它)放進腳踏車，然後帶著裝滿滿番石榴的籃子離開。
(He) put (it) into his bike, and then (he) left with basket that is full of guavas.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ka druadrusa nga kuini suru ini kuini iakay ki e karadradre kuini navate.
S.TRANSL: 他留下兩籃的番石榴。
He left two baskets of guava.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la katuase kuini vavalake katuase iluku mu lrikili kuini navate.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩騎著他的腳踏車帶著番石榴離開。
This child rode his bike to leave with guava.

S.FORM: la katuase katuatuase naudrele la iya kuini ki e ababay yaie la ngucilri kuini e talrupunu ini.
S.TRANSL: 當(他)正離開的時候，(他)想看那女孩，然後帽子掉了。
When (he) was leaving，(he) wanted to see the girl and his hat dropped.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala ka sangucilri yaie ala kirimu sangulrikilrikili yaie la ngucungucungu kuini ki e lrenege.
S.TRANSL: 當(帽子)掉下時，(他)車騎得很快然後(他)撞到了一個石頭。
When (the hat) drops, (he) rides the bike fast (and) then (he) bumps into a stone.

S.FORM: ala katuase muadreke.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)走開(後)跌倒了。
Then (he) leaves to fell.

S.FORM: sa ka muadreke la kuini la navate la ngucilri patelre si e la angeange kuini drapale ini.
S.TRANSL: 當(那男孩)跌倒時，所有的番石榴都被拋出，他的腳很痛。
When (the boy) fell，all the guava has been thrown out，and his leg hurts.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ai sa nguadreke la kela kudra tatulru kudra lamalala kudra mia iniane ka e lavavalake.
S.TRANSL: 但是，當(他)跌倒時，那三個男生夥伴來了，那些小孩就像他。
However, when he fells, those three pals come and these kids are like him.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: sa katuase sa drele iniane yaie la e pararubu iniane malra kudra navate si ala siludu patelre kudra navate pua kuini ki karadrare.
S.TRANSL: 當(他們)邊走邊看到他，然後(他們)幫他撿起番石榴並把所有番石榴放進籃子裡。
When (they) are walking and see him, then (they) help him taking the guavas and put all the guavas into the basket.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格
第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: sa e malra nga kuini navate siludu patelre la pua kuini ki lrikil ini si e ala katuase kuini tatulru kuini lamalala.
S.TRANSL: 當那(他們)撿完了所有番石榴，(他們)把(這些)放進腳踏車裡，然後這三位夥伴離開。
When (they) have picked up all the guavas; then (they) put (these) into the bike, and then these three pals left.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa katuatuase kuini tatulru kuini lavavalake la drelre i anika e talrupunu ini kay la iya si la iya kay wei wei kay tulrupunu su laiya.
S.TRANSL: 當那三個男性朋友們要離開時，(他們)看到(它)然後想「為什麼這個帽子(在這)」，然後(他們)說「喂喂！你的帽子！」。
When the three male pals was leaving, then (they) see (it) and (think) “why is this hat here”; and (they) say “hey! your hat!”

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第二人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: e la katuase bai kudra e.
S.TRANSL: 然後離開去給…
then (they) walk to give that…

S.FORM: tangea kudra lasu si katuase mua kuini ki e mualrikilrikili kuini lasu si la bai iniane kuini talrupunu.
S.TRANSL: 一個男生走去然後(他)把帽子給騎腳踏車的男生。
One boy walked to the boy riding the bike and then (he) gives this hat to him.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la katuase kuini tatulru kuini lamalala takukatuatuase si kanekane kuini navate kuini kibaai kibaai lini kuini ki talragi ini si.
S.TRANSL: 這三個男性朋友一邊走一邊吃著他們朋友給的這個番石榴。
The three male friends is leaving and eating this guavas which is given to them by their friend”

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa katuatuase la lribate kuini ki sa katuatuase la lribate kuini ki tamalramalraane kuini ki navate kuini ki tutumu i la kela mulebe kuini tutumu i.
S.TRANSL: 當(他們)經過老人採番石榴的地方，老人下來了。
When (they) were passing the place where the old man was taking guava, the old man came down.

S.FORM: ani kadrua nga kudra navate li la iya si kudra vaeva kudra iakay ki karadrare ki navate.
S.TRANSL: (他)說「為什麼我的番石榴不見了，那一籃番石榴呢?」
(He) says "why is my guava not there, the one basket of guava?"

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la drele kuini ki tatulru kuini walribalribate si taku kanekane si.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)看到那三個(男孩)一面經過一面吃。
Then (he) saw the three (boys) passing, as long as eating.

S.FORM: la katuase kai wathingale ala ka e nikupaane kuini kanekane lini kuini navate.
S.TRANSL: 他走開(了)，而且不知道這些正被他們吃的番石榴是偷來的。
(He) walked away and didn’t know that these guavas being eaten by them were stolen (from him).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: taku dredrele si taku e iyaiya kay asiamia mua inu kuini navate li la iya.
S.TRANSL: 他邊看邊想：「奇怪！我的番石榴去哪裡了？」
(He) was staring and saying：”how strange! Where did my guavas go?”

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格
